# Git Automation — GitHub Copilot

## Mandatory first step (every invocation)

Read:

1. `.cursor/skill-library/git-sync.md`

## After skills are loaded

Follow the same workflow as `.cursor/agents/git-automation.md`.

Registry: `.github/copilot/AGENT-SKILL-BINDINGS.md`.
